# opnsense_dnsmasq_tag (Data Source)

Look up an existing Dnsmasq DHCP tag on OPNsense by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_dnsmasq_tag" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "dnsmasq_tag_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_dnsmasq_tag.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `tag` (String) Unique Dnsmasq DHCP tag name.
